# STRATAGENT — Marketing Collaborators
*Reference file for agents and humans. When a project requires assets that cannot be auto-generated, consult this file to identify the right collaborator and brief them appropriately.*

---

## How Agents Should Use This File

When a task requires artwork, design, or media that cannot be produced programmatically (e.g. new logo variants, branded proposal covers, event graphics, product photography), the agent should:

1. **Check if existing assets in `Marketing/Logos/` or `Marketing/Collateral/` already cover the need.**
2. **If not — identify the right collaborator below** based on their specialty.
3. **Draft a creative brief** (what is needed, format, dimensions, colour version, deadline) and flag it for Jason to send.
4. **Never guess or approximate brand assets.** Always use approved files or request new ones through the correct collaborator.

---

## Collaborators

---

### Nate Carlson — Graphic Designer
**Studio:** Nate Carlson Designs  
**Website:** [www.n8wc.com](https://www.n8wc.com)  
**Contact form:** [www.n8wc.com/contact](https://www.n8wc.com/contact)  
**Direct email:** *(add when known — currently contact via web form)*  
**Portfolio — SSI / STRATAGENT work:** [www.n8wc.com/portfolio/strategicsalesintl](https://www.n8wc.com/portfolio/strategicsalesintl)

**Relationship:** Existing. Nate designed the STRATAGENT logo suite (v.1 Blue, v.2 Red, all sub-brand lockups, collateral mockups). Has prior SSI context — listed as a named portfolio client.

**Working style:** Remote-first. Works with minimal direction and oversight. Communicates via email and online meetings. Available for on-location work for the right project.

**Specialty:**
- Logo design and brand identity
- Sub-brand lockups (STRATALYST, STRATASCOUT, STRATADAR, STRATEGIST — all variants)
- Collateral (business cards, apparel, print)
- Mascots and illustrative work
- Multi-format asset export (PNG, SVG, PDF, print-ready)

**When to brief Nate:**
- New logo variant needed (new colour, new background, new size/format)
- New agent sub-brand lockup (when STRATADAR or future agents need their own logo)
- Proposal cover artwork or branded header images
- Any print or physical collateral (trade show, apparel, packaging)
- New colour version beyond v.1 Blue and v.2 Red
- Format exports from source files (e.g. SVG vector, EPS for print, transparent PNG)

**Assets Nate holds (source files):**
- STRATAGENT master logo — all versions, both colour families
- Sub-brand lockups: STRATALYST, STRATASCOUT, STRATEGIST (both v.1 and v.2)
- Collateral files: business card, jacket, cap mockups

**Note — branded vs internal agents:**
Only customer-facing agents get sub-brand lockups. STRATADAR is an internal background agent (Active Watch monitor) — no logo needed. The three branded agents are STRATALYST, STRATASCOUT, and STRATEGIST.

**Notes:**
- Copyright: NWC / Nathan W. Carlson © 2026. All original content is copyright. Usage rights assumed for STRATAGENT — confirm scope with Nate if needed for third-party distribution.
- The "Stratativ Slash" referenced in logo file names refers to the diagonal slash design element in the letterforms.

## Agent Briefing Template

*When flagging a design request for Jason to send, use this structure:*

```
DESIGN REQUEST — [Date]

To: [Collaborator name]
Re: [Project / brief description]

What we need:
- Asset type: (logo variant / cover image / icon / etc.)
- Format required: (PNG 2x / SVG / PDF / print-ready)
- Dimensions: 
- Colour version: (v.1 Blue / v.2 Red / other)
- Background: (white / black / transparent)
- Sub-brand: (STRATAGENT only / + agent name)
- Deadline: 
- Where it will be used: (proposal cover / email header / print / etc.)

Reference files:
- See Marketing/Logos/ for existing variants
- See Marketing/Stratagent_Logo_Options_v1.pdf for source layouts

Additional context:
[Any specific notes]
```
